Beachfront Location: Ataraxia in Bastimentos offers direct beachfront access, a lush garden, and a spacious terrace. Guests can relax by the shore or enjoy the outdoor seating area.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature private bathrooms with walk-in showers, garden or sea views, and modern amenities such as free WiFi and flat-screen TVs. Family rooms and balconies provide additional comfort.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves local specialities, warm dishes, and vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes pancakes, fruits, and juice.
Activities and Surroundings: Guests can engage in fishing, yoga, walking tours, canoeing, and snorkelling. Scuba diving is available nearby. Bocas del Toro Isla Colon International Airport is 1 km away.
